creator: zhu.haojie@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Haojie Zhu from comment #4)
Just a quick update:
After removing "lib/saga/libio_shapes_las.so" from pkg-plist, I successfully compiled and installed SAGA 2.1.4 from port. And SAGA toolbox now shows up in QGIS 2.8.1.

Based on the file name, I guess libio_shapes_las.so is for read/write LIDAR file. I checked SAGA 2.1.4 on my Ubuntu system, libio_shapes_las.so is no longer available either. I guess it was removed in SAGA 2.1.4.

Thanks again for fixing this.
